title: Leads Scraper Input
description: Configure Apollo.io filters and optional Hunter.io email enrichment for the scraper run.

personTitle.title: Person Titles
personTitle.description: Filter leads by job title keywords, e.g. ["CEO", "Founder", "CTO"].

personCountry.title: Person Country
personCountry.description: ISO country names to filter by, e.g. ["India", "United States"].

totalResults.title: Total Results to Scrape
totalResults.description: Maximum number of leads to scrape. Set to 0 for unlimited (up to Apollo's cap).

includeEmails.title: Include Email Enrichment
includeEmails.description: If true, will attempt to fetch verified emails from Hunter.io for each lead.

apolloSessionCookie.title: Apollo.io Session Cookie
apolloSessionCookie.description: Your Apollo.io session cookie value (from browser DevTools → Application → Cookies). Required.

hunterApiKey.title: Hunter.io API Key
hunterApiKey.description: Hunter.io API key for email enrichment. Required only when includeEmails is true.

pageSize.title: Results Per Page
pageSize.description: Number of results to request per Apollo API page (max 25 to stay within limits).

requestDelayMs.title: Request Delay (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds between Apollo API page requests to avoid rate limiting.
